name: Spright Jet
name_jp: スプライト・ジェット
desc: If you control a Level/Rank 2 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Spright Jet" once per turn this way. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Spright" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Spright Jet" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a Level/Rank 2 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Spright Jet" once per turn this way. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Spright" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Spright Jet" once per turn.
eff: If you control a Level/Rank 2 monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand). You can only Special Summon "Spright Jet" once per turn this way. If this card is Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Spright" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Spright Jet" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
